title: ctenitis refulgens var. peruviana
intro: Ctenitis refulgens var. peruviana, also known as "Peruvian Polypody," is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ctenitis refulgens var. peruviana include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health and reduce the risk of certain types of cancer. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
